zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Neville I of Thornton Bridge於大約1428年出生在英國越可爾桑頓 布里奇時，她的父親Alexander Neville II40歲，母親Katherine Eure40歲。她於大約1446年與William Fairfax在英國越可爾桑頓 布里奇結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1461年在英國越可爾沃爾頓享年34歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾沃爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Neville I of Thornton Bridge于大约1428年出生在英国越可爾桑頓 布里奇时，她的父亲Alexander Neville II40岁，母亲Katherine Eure40岁。她于大约1446年与William Fairfax在英国越可爾桑頓 布里奇结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1461年在英国越可爾沃爾頓享年34岁，埋葬在英国英格兰韋斯特 越可爾沃爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevells
meanings: Irish: variant of   Neville  .

meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .

English: variant of   Newhall  .

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Neville I of Thornton Bridge was born about 1428, in Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, England, her father, Alexander Neville II, was 40 and her mother, Katherine Eure, was 40. She married William Fairfax about 1446, in Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1461, in Walton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 34, and was buried in Walton, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Neville I of Thornton Bridge est née environ 1428, à Thornton Bridge, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Alexander Neville II, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Katherine Eure, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé William Fairfax environ 1446, à Thornton Bridge, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1461, à Walton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterrée à Walton, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Neville I of Thornton Bridgeが約1428年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソルントン ブリッジで生まれた時，父Alexander Neville IIは40歳，母Katherine Eureは40歳であった。約1446年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソルントン ブリッジでWilliam Fairfaxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1461年にイギリスヨークシュアイアワルトンで34歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアワルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Neville I of Thornton Bridge(이)가 대략 1428년 영국 요르크실르 토른턴 브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Neville II(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Eure(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 대략 1446년 영국 요르크실르 토른턴 브리지에서 William Fairfax(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1461년 영국 요르크실르 월턴에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 월턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Neville I of Thornton Bridge родилась около 1428 г. в местности таурнтон бридж, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Alexander Neville II было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Eure, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Fairfax около 1446 г. в местности таурнтон бридж, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1461 г. в местности валтон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 34 лет и была похоронена в местности валтон, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
